title: New `move_subitem` webhook
excerpt: We just added the move_subitem webhook that allows you to listen for when a subitem moves from one parent item to another. Check out our documentation to see the complete list of available event types!

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: We just added the move_subitem webhook that allows you to listen for when a subitem moves from one parent item to another. Check out our documentation to see the complete list of available event types!
